zh.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Verona是Alberto I Della Scala和Verde di Salizzole的兒子，於1284年出生在義大利維圖維洛納。他於1306年1月1日與Beatrice Corregio在義大利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1311年10月28日在義大利隆巴迪亞布雷西亞享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Verona是Alberto I Della Scala和Verde di Salizzole的儿子，于1284年出生在意大利維圖維洛納。他于1306年1月1日与Beatrice Corregio在意大利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1311年10月28日在意大利隆巴迪亞布雷西亞享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: della
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Carmine, Geno, Amelio, Aniello, Concetta, Cosmo, Flavio, Gaetano, Gennaro, Mafalda, Raffaele.
Italian: habitational name from any of numerous minor places called Cella or Celle (from cella ‘cell’), because they were once the locations of hermits’ cells.

nameMeanings.name: Scala
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Luigi, Sal, Antonio, Carmine, Corrado, Orazio, Tiziana, Aldo, Angelo, Carlo, Carmela, Concetta.

Italian: topographic name from scala ‘ladder, flight of steps; wharf’ for someone who lived by a flight of steps or on terraced land; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Scala in Salerno province, Scala Coeli in Cosenza, or the district so named in Torregrotta, in Messina province, Sicily. Compare Di Scala and La Scala .
Americanized form of Czech Skála, Polish and Jewish (from Poland) Skała, or Slovak and Rusyn Skala .

variants.name: Di Scala
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emidio, Luigi, Nicola, Paolo.
Italian: habitational name for someone from any of various places places named with scala ‘ladder, flight of steps; wharf’ (see Scala ).

variants.name: Scalese
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Gennaro, Guido, Pasquale, Vincenzo.
Italian (southern): probably a habitational name for someone from Scala in Salerno province (see   Scala  ).

variants.name: Scalera
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Vito, Angelo, Carmine, Ciro, Gilda, Lorenzo, Luciano, Pasquale.
Italian:
habitational name from a district so named in Filiano in Potenza province.

variants.name: La Scala
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Faust, Natale, Nicola, Silvio.
Italian (also Lascala): variant of Scala , with the addition of the definite article la.

variants.name: Skala
meanings: Czech (Skála); Slovak (also Skála); Polish and Jewish (from Poland) (Skała); Rusyn (from Slovakia and Poland; in Poland spelled Skała): topographic name for someone who lived by a rock or crag, Czech skála, Slovak and Rusyn skala, Polish skała. As a Jewish surname this is often artificial. Compare Scala and Skalla .

variants.name: Scali
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Domenic, Antonio, Geraldo, Orlando, Pasquale, Rocco, Carmela, Cesare, Fortunato, Giuseppe, Mauro, Pasqualina, Piero, Rosario, Saverio.
Italian (southern):
habitational name from Scali in Piedimonte Etneo, Sicily, named with Greek skali(n) ‘step, terrace’ (itself derived from Latin scala ‘ladder’), or from some other similarly named place.

nameMeanings.name: Alboino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ramon, Manuel, Ana, Carlos, Julio, Luis, Raul, Ruben, Alfonso, Andres, Angel.  Italian Pasquale, Angelo, Antonio, Carmine, Giovanni, Luigi, Sal, Santo, Saverio, Ubalda.
Portuguese, Spanish, and southern Italian:
from the personal name Albino (see Albin ).

variants.name: Albini
meanings: feminine form of Albinus, a derivative of the Roman family name Albius, which is from albus ‘white’. It is the name of a minor saint: St Albina , who was martyred at Caesarea in 250 . She is particularly venerated in Campania, where her relics are preserved to this day.

variants.name: Albin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alby .

variants.name: Alvino
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ælf ‘elf, supernatural being’ + wine ‘friend’. This was not especially common in Britain either before or after the Norman Conquest, but it is popular in the United States. The reasons for this are not entirely clear; association with Calvin may be a factor. A more plausible (though less elevated) explanation is that this was the name given to the naughty chipmunk in a popular television cartoon series of the 1960s.

en.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Verona was born in 1284, in Verona, Veneto, Italy as the son of Alberto I Della Scala and Verde di Salizzole. He married Beatrice Corregio on 1 January 1306, in Italy. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 28 October 1311, in Brescia, Lombardy, Italy, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Verona est né en 1284, à Verona, Veneto, Italie, fils de Alberto I Della Scala et Verde di Salizzole. Il a épousé Beatrice Corregio le 1 janvier 1306, à Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1311, à Brescia, Lombardia, Italie, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Verona wurde 1284 in Verona, Veneto, Italien, als Sohn von Alberto I Della Scala und Verde di Salizzole geboren. Er hat am 1. Januar 1306 in Italien Beatrice Corregio geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1311 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Brescia, Lombardei, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Verona è nato il nel 1284 nel Verona, Veneto, Italia come figlio di Alberto I Della Scala e Verde di Salizzole. Lui sposato Beatrice Corregio il 1 gennaio 1306, nel Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 28 ottobre 1311, nel Brescia, Lombardia, Italia, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Veronaは1284年にイタリアベンエトーバーオナでAlberto I Della ScalaとVerde di Salizzoleの息子として生まれた。1306年1月1日にイタリアでBeatrice Corregioと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1311年10月28日にイタリアロンバーディアブレスシアで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Verona(은)는 1284년 이탈리아 븐토 베로나에서 Alberto I Della Scala(와)과 Verde di Salizzole의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1306년 1월 1일 이탈리아에서 Beatrice Corregio(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1311년 10월 28일 이탈리아 롬바디아 브레스샤에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Verona nasceu em 1284, em Verona, Veneto, Itália filho de Alberto I Della Scala e Verde di Salizzole. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Corregio em 1 de janeiro de 1306, em Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1311, em Brescia, Lombardia, Itália, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Verona родился в 1284 г. в местности вирона, винето, Италия. Его родителей звали Alberto I Della Scala и Verde di Salizzole. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Corregio 1 января 1306 г. в местности Италия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 28 октября 1311 г. в местности бресся, ломбардя, Италия в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Alboino della Scala , signore di Verona nació en 1284, en Verona, Veneto, Italia como hijo de Alberto I Della Scala y Verde di Salizzole. Se casó con Beatrice Corregio el 1 de enero de 1306, en Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1311, en Brescia, Lombardia, Italia, a la edad de 27 años.
